title: UMI User Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for user/account information on the local machine.

Username.description: Login name of the user account.

UserId.description: OS-assigned user identifier. Linux/macOS: numeric UID. Windows: SID string.

FullName.description: Display name if configured, null otherwise.

Shell.description: Default shell. Linux/macOS: '/bin/bash'. Windows: null or 'powershell'.

IsCurrentUser.description: True if this is the user running the current session.

IsAdmin.description: True if user has elevated/root/administrator privileges.

IsEnabled.description: True if account is active, false if disabled, null if unknown.

Groups.description: List of group names the user belongs to.

LastLogin.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last login, or null if unavailable.
